greetings: Hey! So you're the new florist in Salt Creek everyone's been talking about.
Hmm... You remind me of someone.
I recognize everyone in Salt Creek, but not you...
Oo... You're new to Salt Creek aren't you?
intro_comments: Woa! It's been forever since I've stepped in here
*Their eyes explore your dusty old shop*
Damn, I wasn't expecting to run into a florist in Salt Creek.
I never thought I'd walk into this store again.
Salt Creeks' got a florist now? waaat?
Oooh! What a cool outfit you're in... Okay so,
Eeep! Was that a rat!? You better deal with that before it makes a nest. Anyway,
Oh, why am I not suprised? Eh, anyway...
Boy-o-boy, what a wonderful little shop this is.
Ew, did I just see a dead cockroach? Anyway...
end_comments: Don't keep me waiting too long.
I look forward to witnessing what you can do little one.
*their beady eyes watch you as you work*
*Sighs* I can't wait for this day to be over so that I can hit my bed.
I don't have alot of time.
You got all of that right?
successful_response: This is perfect!
Oh you... you wonderful person. Thank you!
Excellent!
Excellent.
Perfect!
Perfecto!
This is my new favorite shop in all of Salt Creek!
Woah
Oh my, this is absolutely gorgeous!
Oh wow! Perfect!
I never doubted you. This is amazing!
Such pwetty liddle flowerss!
Ahbinga-boinga this is wonderful! I don't even know what to say.
I don't even know what to say, it's perfect.
Erm... This is totally wickedsauce.
You've just raised my standards, impressive.
Oh you're so much more better than Randy and his dingy lil flower shop.
*eyebrows raised*
*jaw dropped* I... uhhh.. yea wow, thank you!
These are great! Thank you so much!
You're an amazing person!
You're definetly going to see me again.
Oh you're going places, this is perfect!
This turned out better than I could've imagined.
*inhales deeply* Woah, just woah.
Oh my gosh! I love these
I love these!
failure_response: Was it that hard to follow simple instructions?
Yea, this is just not it buddy.
Damn... This was not what I was expecting.
You've got to be kidding me.
I don't think this is what I asked of you.
I was right to be skeptical about you.
Did you like, not hear me at all?
??? What's this?
*side-eying-Chloe*
Yea nah...
Dissapointing.
You had just one job.
What do you want me to do with this?
*nods dismissively*
Aww... This isn't what I asked for.
Sorry, this is not what I wanted.
*sighs in disbelief*
Did you not hear me?
Umm... this is not what I requested.
Incorrect!
*slams fist on table* this is not what I wanted!
What's the point of opening a flower shop if you're gonna be such a bad florist?

prompt: My older sister is getting married tonight, can you believe it? Cause I can't... well, I was wondering if you could uhh... make me a [color=#4169E1][bouquet][/color] bouquet?

I can't believe my little brother is getting married and here I am doing these damned fetch quests, still single and alone. Anyway, could you make me a [color=#4169E1][bouquet][/color] bouquet please?
Do you know how to make a [color=#4169E1][bouquet][/color]? I'm getting married tommorow and I need everything to be nothing short of purr-fect, capiche?

Did you know it's marriage season in Salt Creek? Wanna guess who's the lucky lass? It's obviously meeeeee! And it's only customary that I celebrate my significant other by gifting them a [color=#4169E1][bouquet][/color] bouquet and a dazzling new fit.
My best friend is getting married in the next hour. Could you do me a [color=#4169E1][bouquet][/color] please?

nectar_red: ... I hope they know that I [color=#8435c4]love[/color] them despite abandoning me in the middle of the woods.

... Oof, words can't fully express how much in [color=#8435c4]love[/color] i'm in with the groom, I even have their name tattooed onto me, wanna see? Oh, wait I forgot it's uhh... in a rather risky area.
nectar_green: ... Hmm... I wonder if they know that I know that they cheated. I hope they feel [color=#8435c4]ashamed[/color] of themselves.
nectar_purple: ... Ahh, they've done so much for me, I [color=#8435c4]respect[/color] them for advising me not to get into a fight with that bear.
devils_pitchfork: ... Oh I wish I could leave a [color=#8435c4]powerful[/color] impression on them.
crystal_heart: ... Y'know a lil birdie told me that the wedding location might be [color=#8435c4]haunted[/color], apparantly several people were hanged nearby, that's so cool right?
butter_lilly: ... Oh shoot, I totally forgot that it's pollen season, my [color=#8435c4]nose[/color] is going to drive me insane.
filigree: ... Ugh, I hate that Brock will also be attending the wedding. That man is the [color=#8435c4]stinkiest[/color] buffoon in all of Salt Creek.
sky_bloom: ... [color=#8435c4]Sky blooms[/color] are my favorite, wait why am I telling you this?
silkweed: ... Geez, is it normal to feel so scared and [color=#8435c4]anxious[/color]? I don't know what to do.
... God, if you can hear me, I hope there are some pudgy lil [color=#8435c4]cats[/color] around to play with at the wedding.

prompt: Did ya notice the entire towns hung up wreaths round their doors. Poor [name] got his head bashed in by an eagle earlier today! I don't really wanna attend but, I mean, free snacks ya know? Could you be a dear and make me a [color=#4169E1][bouquet][/color] bouquet to leave behind at their memorial please?
I'm uhh... headed to the cemetery to pay my respects to my old boss... but it kinda feels wrong to arrive empty-handed. Could you quickly prepare me a [color=#4169E1][bouquet][/color] bouquet?
Could I please get one [color=#4169E1][bouquet][/color] for ma lil buddy... burried six feet under.

nectar_red: ... Truth be told, I [color=#8435c4]loved[/color] them but I never could bring myself to say it out loud.
nectar_green: ... I'm the reason they're dead, geez I hope they know how [color=#8435c4]sorry[/color] I am.
nectar_purple: ... They were a disturbed soul. I hope they get to rest in [color=#8435c4]peace[/color] now.
devils_pitchfork: ... They really loved those creepy [color=#8435c4]devil[/color] lookin flowers.
crystal_heart: ... I pray no [color=#8435c4]spirit[/color] attacks me while I'm there.
butter_lilly: ... Ugh, between all the crying and cold dry air my [color=#8435c4]nose[/color] just won't quit running.
filigree: ... You ever notice how [color=#8435c4]stinky[/color] those damn cemeteries are?
sky_bloom: ...  I guess [color=#8435c4]life[/color] really does come full circle huh.
silkweed: ... Ugh, why do graveyards gotta be so spooky? I get so [color=#8435c4]scared[/color].
... Y'know there's this one pitch black cemetery [color=#8435c4]cat[/color] that likes to nap between the gravestones. I really hope to run into it today.
